message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 231 migrate 6 wezterm direct-call sites (robot command family) to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues the wezterm surface migration started in tick 230. Six
more sites in the robot-command cluster:

1. L16563 robot state (list_panes):
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
2. L16775 robot get-text --all branch (list_panes):
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
3. L16928 robot get-text single-pane branch (get_text):
   `wezterm.get_text_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, escapes)`
4. L17205 robot send dry-run (get_pane):
   `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
5. L17269 robot send actual (get_pane):
   `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
6. L17351 robot send actual (send_text):
   `wezterm.send_text_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, &text)` (reuses `cx`
   from same-scope get_pane migration above — no duplicate binding)

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 10/28 wezterm sites migrated (36%). Remaining 18 sites
across:
- Wait-for command (L17515)
- Workflow-start dry-run (L19231)
- RPC list_panes (L19245)
- Doctor running_agents (L21155, L21271)
- Doctor panes listing (L21207)
- Workflow-start pane list (L23885)
- Human send (L24131, L24170, L24268, L24318)
- Human commit (L26425, L26974)
- Workspace restore list (L25289)
- Cross-boundary status (L35449)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
